title: senna aculeata
intro: Senna aculeata, also known as Cassia auriculata, is a flowering plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. Senna aculeata can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in powder form to make capsules or tablets, and is also used as a component in some traditional remedies.
